author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

This *partially* addresses https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/34378, namely issues 2. 3. and 4. of that list.
In addition a unit test to check basic functionalities of the `conddb` script is added.

#### PR validation:

The newly introduced unit test passes:
```
scram b runtests_test_conddb
```

#### if this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR:

N/A
title: Introduce `conddb` script unit tests
